title: Skillify
subtitle: Career Roadmap Generator
description: Skillify is an AI-powered platform transforming how users advance their academic and professional journeys. By analyzing each user’s unique skills, interests, and goals, Skillify creates dynamic, personalized career roadmaps. It helps users identify strengths, close skill gaps, and follow curated learning paths with certifications, all tailored to meet evolving market demands.

title: Securize
subtitle: Cybersecurity analytics platform
description: Securize is an AI-powered cybersecurity analytics platform that helps organizations identify and respond to security threats in real-time. It uses machine learning to analyze security events and provide insights into potential vulnerabilities and threats.

title: TumorSense
subtitle: AI-Powered Tumor Detection System
description: TumorSense is a Light weight CLI ML model that uses deep learning to detect tumors in using medical data. It mainly targets breast cancer detection and provides insights on whether the tumor is malignant or benign.

title: Car Price Prediction model
subtitle: Machine Learning model
description: Car Price Prediction model is a Light weight CLI ML model that uses deep learning to predict the price of a car based on the features of the car.

title: Ticketerr
subtitle: Ticketing System
description: Ticketerr is a movies and tickets booking system that help users to buy tickets and vendors to sell tickets.

title: Travel Buddy
subtitle: Travel Sharing Site
description: Travel Buddy is a comprehensive travel booking system that allows users to search, compare, and add their own experiences.

title: Fitness Center
subtitle: Fitness Center Product Site
description: Fitness Center is a platform for fitness enthusiasts to discover and book training sessions.
